title: Cilantro Fold Vegan Jerk
description: A buttery and juicy vegan jerk dish featuring cilantro, plant-based friendly and perfect for a solo dinner.
instructions: In a large pot, heat the oil over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and diced onions to sauté for about 3 minutes until fragrant.
Add the bell peppers and cook for another 5-7 minutes or until they become slightly softened.
Stir in the prepared jerk seasoning and continue cooking for an additional minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Add both types of beans and simmer for about 10-12 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
Remove from heat and mix in the lime juice. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
Divide the mixture into individual serving dishes.
Gently fold in the chopped cilantro and then drizzle with plant-based butter until evenly coated.
Serve hot as a vegan jerk dish.
